questions.clue: Born in Gdansk (then Danzig), he introduced his eponymous temperature scale in 1724

He came to power after leading the march on Rome in October 1922

In 1429 Joan of Arc took up arms against the English to bring succor to this besieged city

This actor & presenter of the glories of Italian food made his movie directorial debut with the restaurant tale "Big Night"

The name of a direct-to-consumer genetic info company includes this number, the total chromosome pairs in a typical human cell

Latin for "hair" gives us the name of these blood vessels
Coral polyps excrete hard skeletons made of this, CaCO3; get enough of the little guys together & you get a reef
The 1930s added a zeroth law of this, saying 2 objects in thermal equilibrium with a 3rd are in equilibrium as well
